inputs.label: Quantum Number n
inputs.businessContext: Principal quantum number (n = 1, 2, 3, ...) indicating the energy level of the particle.

businessContext_i18n.en: Principal quantum number (n = 1, 2, 3, ...) indicating the energy level of the particle.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baş kuantum sayısı (n = 1, 2, 3, ...) parçacığın enerji seviyesini belirtir.

inputs.label: Particle Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the particle confined in the infinite well (e.g., electron mass).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the particle confined in the infinite well (e.g., electron mass).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonsuz kuyuda hapsedilmiş parçacığın kütlesi (örneğin, elektron kütlesi).

inputs.label: Box Length
inputs.businessContext: Width of the one-dimensional infinite potential well.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the one-dimensional infinite potential well.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek boyutlu sonsuz potansiyel kuyusunun genişliği.

inputs.label: Position x
inputs.businessContext: Position inside the well (0 < x < L) at which the wavefunction is evaluated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Position inside the well (0 < x < L) at which the wavefunction is evaluated.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalga fonksiyonunun değerlendirildiği kuyu içindeki konum (0 < x < L).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
